task: FR-P5 Unified Media Production, Runtime Integration, Pages Package and Performance

executionPolicy.instruction: Do not stop at an internal milestone merely because the task is long. Continue through inventory, experiments, generation, integration, build cutover, browser/Pages acceptance and closeout unless a genuine quality or safety blocker is found.

webCompleted: created the single FR-P5 shared branch from the accepted FR-P4B-R1 main
defined ordinal and repository-safe media path policy
implemented canonical Carmela and Work Cells media-reference inventory generation
implemented corrected 27-topic Work Cells evidence generation without rewriting historical FR-P4B files
implemented deterministic media-manifest and quality-policy validators
implemented a pure browser picture/srcset resolver with original fallback
implemented a Pillow derivative generator candidate with write/check/dry-run/sample/role/output modes
implemented exact release-plan copying and missing/extra output audit
registered explicit npm media workflow commands
added FR-P5 foundation and release-plan tests to the canonical test runner
documented unified media architecture, quality experiments, legacy evidence correction and build/Pages cutover strategy
added a clearly non-accepted candidate quality-policy template
explicitlyUnchanged: all Carmela and Work Cells product media bytes
current Pages runtime and request contracts
requiredLocalHardeningBeforeGeneration: run Node syntax and targeted tests for every web-added module
run Python py_compile and execute the generator only in safe scratch/sample mode first
force TemporaryDirectory under task-scratch/fr-p5 rather than repository root
harden derivative/manifest atomic installation with rollback on failure
select a derivative fallback that avoids publishing originals when accepted role variants exist
make Python and Node canonical policy-hash calculations byte-identical and verify manifest.policyHash
confirm Pillow encoder options are supported by the exact accepted local version
confirm manifest source-format coverage for every actual referenced image
review release-plan contents for all currently fetched Carmela content JSON and any generated manifest shards
do not activate build or renderer cutover until real derivatives, manifest, policy and release plan all validate
requiredLocalExecution: generate and track the media-reference inventory and corrected Work Cells inventory
enrich every referenced image with Pillow dimensions, mode, alpha, orientation, decode and duplicate evidence
verify missing/corrupt referenced media equals zero
select representative media from every role and run real multi-format/multi-size visual experiments
freeze the accepted Pillow version, quality profiles and measured dist/route budgets
write reports/portfolio/fr-p5/fr-p5-media-quality-policy.json
generate all accepted derivatives and public/media/media-manifest.json
repeat generation and prove byte-identical outputs
validate source/variant hashes, role coverage and zero stale/missing/orphan derivatives
measure the actual manifest size and choose global lazy, owner-shard or build-projection loading with evidence
directly integrate assets/media-resolver.js into Carmela and Work Cells renderers without monkey patches
preserve on-demand media, grouped lightbox, answer, focus, route cleanup and Carmela audio behavior
generate and track the exact media release plan
switch scripts/build.mjs from recursive product-media copying to the exact release-plan copier
extend dist audit and verify-release to media inventory, manifest, derivatives and release-plan gates
run 12/12 Carmela and 27/27 Work Cells visual/network/DPR/srcset acceptance
repeat the relevant FR-P4B-R1 continuous geometry contract after picture integration
verify audio Range 206, Pages MIME/cache/ETag/project-subpath and exact Git blob equality
run exactly one final full npm run verify:release after all affected closures pass
fast-forward main, push, verify exact-SHA Pages, delete the task branch, stop servers and clean scratch/workspace
notClaimedByWeb: real image dimensions or bytes beyond existing tracked metadata

finalRequiredStatus.NEXT_RECOMMENDED_PHASE: FR-P6 Final Acceptance and Project Seal
